author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Plan: Download Pythia-160M weights from HuggingFace. The model expects safetensors format at models/pythia-160m/model_f32.safetensors plus config.json. HuggingFace hosts EleutherAI/pythia-160m with safetensors. Will download model.safetensors and config.json, then run inference.
